account.title: Account Settings
account.changePasswordDesc: Change your password regularly to keep your account safe
account.pwdFailed: Failed to update password, please try again
account.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account
account.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting your account will remove all data. This is irreversible. Deletion takes effect after 30 days during which you can cancel.
account.emailMismatch: Email address does not match, please try again
account.deleteFailed: Failed to submit, please try again

validation.displayNameMax: Display name must not exceed {max} characters

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarFormatHint: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, max 5MB
profile.avatarFormatError: Only JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP images are supported
profile.avatarFailed: Avatar upload failed, please try again
profile.dangerZoneDesc: After deleting your account, you will have a 30-day grace period to restore it.
profile.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This cannot be undone (after 30-day grace period).

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorDesc: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password to enable two-factor authentication.
security.step1Desc: Scan the QR code below with Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password, or enter the key manually.
security.step2Desc: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.
security.step3Desc: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once and cannot be recovered if lost.
security.disableDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator to confirm disabling 2FA.
security.disableFailed: Failed to disable, please try again
security.passkeyDesc: Use device biometrics (Touch ID / Face ID) to sign in without a password
security.passkeyNotSupported: This browser does not support Passkey
security.passkeyConfirmDeleteDesc: This device will no longer be able to sign in with Passkey. You can still sign in with password + 2FA.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.desc: Used to access idcd services via API. Keep them safe and never expose them.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.empty: No API Keys yet. Click "Create API Key" to get started.
apiKeys.createDesc: Set a name and type for your new API Key
apiKeys.createFailed: Failed to create, please try again
apiKeys.onceWarning: This key is shown only once. Copy and store it safely.
apiKeys.securityNote: API Keys have full access to your account. Never hardcode them in client code. Use environment variables instead.
apiKeys.cardDesc: Used to access the idcd API. Keep it secret; never share it.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.desc: These are the currently active login sessions on your account
sessions.revokeError: Failed to revoke, please try again
sessions.revokeAllDesc: This will revoke {count} other active session(s) besides the current one. Login state on other devices will be invalidated immediately. This action cannot be undone.

team.title: Team Management
team.noTeamDesc: Create a team to share resources with members
team.createTeamDesc: Enter a team name and unique identifier
team.inviteDesc: Enter an email address and select a role
team.inviteOnceWarning: This invite link is shown only once. Copy it now and send it to the invitee via email or IM — you won't be able to view it again after closing.
team.teamApiKeysDesc: Team-level API keys for CI/CD or automation integrations
team.addKeyDesc: Create a shared team API key
team.keyOnceWarning: This key is only shown once. Copy and store it securely.
team.teamSubscriptionDesc: Manage your team's Agent Pro subscription

tokens.title: Access Tokens
tokens.desc: Long-lived access tokens for CLI tools and MCP integrations
tokens.name: Token Name
tokens.empty: No tokens yet. Click "Generate New Token" to get started.
tokens.createDesc: Set a name, scopes, and expiry for your new token
tokens.createFailed: Failed to create, please try again
tokens.onceWarning: This token is shown only once. Copy and store it safely.
tokens.securityNote: Personal Access Tokens have account access. Never expose them in code repositories. Use environment variables instead.
